chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1600 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 11.11.2016. Mr. Muhammad Yameen Rajput, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w SIP Muhammad Younus Rajput SHO P.S Shahdadpur, District Sanghar. = Petitioner’s Counsel is present and submits that petitioner has been continuously harassed by the private respondents and despite the complaint, the concerned SHO-respondent No.3 is not taking any action. Today, the parawise comments have been filed by the official respondents No.2 & 3 and according to which none of the police officials is involved by causing any harassment to the petitioner and it is further stated that primarily the dispute between the private respondents and petitioner is that of civil nature. Be that as it may, today the concerned SHO-Muhammad Younus Rajput is present in person, who is directed to provide protection to the petitioner but strictly in accordance with law, if he approached with such a request. The private respondents are directed not to extend any threats and visit house of the petitioner or cause any harassment, however, if they have any grievance agaisnt the petitioner, the same should be redressed through due process of law. With these observations, the present petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
